description: The ``DateTime Day Of Year`` node takes in a DateTime and returns the day of the year (represented as an int) from that DateTime. This takes into account the days in the months accumulated so far in that year and adds them together, as well as any leap year days that were in that year.

fields.DateTime: The DateTime we are getting info from.
fields.* ([[Type:int|int]]): The day of the year from this DateTime.
